title: Top Agent Frameworks — Q2 2026
description: The top 10 autonomous agent frameworks ranked by OpenAI and Gemini, compared side by side. Production depth, architectural paradigms, and where the two models agree — and where they don't.

title: LangChain Explained
description: The framework that makes AI agents buildable, debuggable, and deployable. Five core concepts that handle 90% of use cases, the full ecosystem from library to platform, and an honest decision guide.

title: llama.cpp Explained
description: The open-source C/C++ engine that made running LLMs on your own hardware possible. GGUF quantisation, the Ollama ecosystem, hardware requirements, and when local inference beats the cloud.
